javadoc_before:
/**
     * Helper method for finding wrapper type for given primitive type (why isn't
     * there one in JDK?).
     * NOTE: throws {@link IllegalArgumentException} if given type is NOT primitive
     * type (caller has to check).
     */
javadoc_after:
/** * Helper method for finding wrapper type for given primitive type (why isn't * there one in JDK?). *

* NOTE: as of 3.1, no longer throws {@link IllegalArgumentException} if given type * is NOT primitive, but returns {@code null}. */
